case_title: LIU, LINDA YUE YING IND.& DBA ARTISTIC IMAGE VS BUZBUZIAN, DENISE IND.& DBA BANK CARD SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,018.00 FILED BY LIU, LINDA YUE YING IND.& DBA ARTISTIC IMAGE AS TO DEFENDANT BUZBUZIAN, DENISE IND.& DBA BANK CARD SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, LINDA YUE YING IND.& DBA ARTISTIC IMAGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUZBUZIAN, DENISE IND.& DBA BANK CARD SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-11-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-25-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT; UNCLAIMED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-16-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-18-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE TO APPEAR ON 6/18/01.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUZBUZIAN, DENISE IND.& DBA BANK CARD SERVICES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-25-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-16-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 5/16/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED.
